content.en:
Moshan Prison.

Ye Tian entered Lord Muchen's prison, fought with him for a while, severely injured the other party, and was about to kill him, when suddenly a terrifying aura erupted from Lord Muchen's body.

This Mu Chen Lord is a seven-step Immortal Realm Lord, and Ye Tian is a six-step Immortal Realm Lord, even if he can exert all his strength in this prison void, his cultivation is still not as good as the other party, after all, the prison void will only suppress cultivation, not increase cultivation.

However, Ye Tian can fight beyond the level, so he is not afraid.

But now, Lord Muchen has truly shown his strength.

Airplanes!

An invisible realm enveloped the entire prison void, and the next moment a ray of light pierced through in an instant.

In the face of this ray, it seemed that everything was condensed, even Ye Tian couldn't dodge it, the wall light of the will was pierced, the void true body was difficult to resist, and the body was directly penetrated.

Not only that, but there was also a terrifying force destroying Ye Tian's replica body.

"I'm a thousand hands!"

Rumble!!!

In the void, one hand of the "Zero Seventy-Three" Mu Chen Lord appeared, bombarding towards Ye Tian, and the power contained in each hand was comparable to the full force of the legendary eternal technique, and when combined, it shattered all the innate eternal rules, and even the will was crushed.

This blow and the blow just now seem to contain eternal power, will, and innate eternal rules, and they are all combined, as if they are the fusion of three forces, thus forming a qualitative change force.

Soon.

Ye Tian was hit hard and couldn't compete with Lord Muchen at all.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had encountered such a terrifying Immortal Realm Lord, who was much stronger than him, no matter how many legendary eternal skills he had, no matter how strong his foundation was, he would not be able to compete with him.

In the end, Ye Tian's replica body chose to leave this prison.

Outside the prison.

Ye Tian stood in front of the stone tablet, not leaving, but pondering.

"Lord Muchen is hiding very deeply, if I don't want to kill him, he won't reveal his strength, maybe even Moshan doesn't know Lord Muchen's strength, right?" Ye Tian muttered.

In the battle with Lord Muchen, although he was defeated, he still saw something.

However, he would need to fight Lord Muchen many times before he could verify the results.

After a period of time, Ye Tian could continue to enter this prison, so he entered again and fought with Lord Muchen, but it was still a fiasco.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian fought with Lord Muchen many times, and gradually realized the strangeness of Lord Muchen.

"The power exerted by Lord Mu Chen is the power generated after the fusion of will, body, and innate eternal rules, a power that only a Legendary Realm Lord has, but he is just an Immortal Realm Lord, if he really fuses his body, will, and innate eternal rules, then it cannot be an Immortal Realm Lord, but a Legendary Realm Lord. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, he also felt a special aura.

The reason why Lord Muchen was able to perform such an eternal technique was entirely after the advent of a realm, that is to say, it was that realm that gave Lord Muchen such a means

"That realm should have the effect attached to the Eternal Arcana. "

Ye Tian guessed.

The special aura he sensed was the breath of the Eternal Treasure, he obtained the fragment of the Eternal Treasure, so he was somewhat familiar with the breath of the Eternal Treasure, Lord Muchen was very likely to have an Eternal Treasure, and this Eternal Pregnancy Treasure could allow him to create a special realm, in such a realm, he could forcibly fuse the body, will, and innate eternal rules to form a new power, so as to perform a legendary eternal technique.

In fact, such a legendary eternal technique can no longer be regarded as a legendary eternal technique, because the power it contains belongs to the power that can only be cast in the legendary realm, so such an eternal technique can be called a half-step legendary eternal technique.

Ye Tian's most powerful Eternal Technique is only a top-notch Legendary Eternal Technique, where can it compare to a half-step Legendary Eternal Technique.

Moreover, Ye Tian's cultivation was weaker than that of the other party, and his combat experience was even somewhat inferior to that of the other party.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian was naturally far from his opponent.

However, this does not mean that Ye Tian is helpless against the other party.

An Eternal Arcana that could exist, maybe it was still an intact Eternal Arcana, enough to make any Legendary Realm Lord crazy, let alone him.

Therefore, he must kill this prisoner at all costs and obtain the eternal treasure from his hands.

Compared to Lord Muchen, Ye Tian's advantage was that he was free, while Lord Muchen was a prisoner who was imprisoned, and he couldn't even cultivate normally, and even his recovery speed was very slow.

"If you don't give Lord Muchen time to recover, his combat power will actually slowly decline!"

Ye Tian thought.

Immediately, he was ready to copy one body after another, and it was the body of a different person, so that he could enter the prison without time interval and fight with Lord Muchen, after all, it was a different Immortal Realm Lord who entered the prison, and the Moshan Prison would not stop it.

In this way, Lord Muchen would not have time to rest and recover.

If the battle continues again and again, Lord Muchen's strength will become weaker and weaker, and in that case, Ye Tian will be able to kill Lord Muchen.

This is a flaw in Moshan's prison, but it is aimed at the defect of the prisoner, and the prisoner has no status for Moshan, even if he knows about this flaw, Moshan doesn't care at all.

Wow!

Ye Tian copied the body of a six-step Immortal Realm Lord, and immediately entered Lord Muchen's prison, and fought with Lord Muchen, and soon this copy body was killed in battle

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to copy a body into this prison, and continued to fight with Lord Muchen without stopping

In this way, Lord Mu Chen slashed one six-step Immortal Realm Lord after another.

"Damn, what's going on? Even if these Immortal Realm Lords are all clones and have fallen, they have only lost one clone, but how can they all be willing to lose their clones?"

Lord Muchen said angrily.

He guessed that he might have exposed the Eternal Treasure, but in that case, it would not work if he didn't expose it, if he didn't urge that Eternal Treasure, he wouldn't be able to defeat Ye Tian at all, and he hadn't encountered a few of such demonic immortal realms.

Therefore, he had to press the eternal treasure.

However, he roughly guessed the situation in the outside world, Moshan probably didn't exist anymore, after all, he hadn't met Moshan's disciples for a long time, but this time it was very strange, many six-step and half-step Eternal Realms besieged and killed, and some even the Immortal Realm he knew, had also been caught by Moshan and imprisoned here, but now he ran to his prison void to fight with him.

Could it be that those immortal realms have been unleashed to serve another force?

He tried to communicate with those immortal realms, but the other party ignored them at all, and instead fought him desperately at all costs.

Gradually, his strength was consumed, and he simply couldn't recover in time, the energy provided by the Prison Void was too small, and it would take a long time to regain his strength.

After a while, he started to get injured and had a hard time recovering.

Finally, he became seriously injured, and he couldn't even beat a six-step Immortal Realm Lord.

After he slashed the Nameless Six-Step Immortal Realm at the cost of heavy damage and dying, Ye Tian, who had made him familiar, descend again.

This time, Ye Tian descended on Lord Muchen's prison void with his own body as a template.

Lord Muchen knew that he couldn't kill Ye Tian again, and his face showed despair.

"This lord, I can surrender and serve the forces behind you, don't kill me, okay?"

Lord Muchen begged for mercy 0.9.

"You think that if you beg for mercy, I will not kill you, what I killed you for, you should know. Ye Tian sneered.

Lord Muchen naturally understands that it is naturally for the eternal treasure.

He was very reluctant to accept this Eternal Treasure, when he was captured by a legendary realm lord of Moshan, he didn't expose the Eternal Treasure, and he didn't even resist much, because he knew very well that once he urged the Eternal Treasure, he would definitely die.

And he was caught, and it was difficult for Moshan to find his eternal treasure, even if he was imprisoned, he still had hope of leaving in the future.

But this time, he really had no hope.

"I am willing to hand over the eternal treasure in my hands!"

Lord Muchen said.

"I don't worry about you! After killing you, the Eternal Treasure will still be mine!"

Ye Tian cast a hundred million voids and directly blasted the dying Lord Mu Chen to death.

After killing Lord Muchen, the eternal treasure on his body could not be hidden, and it was easily found by Ye Tian. _
